teaser.about: Who I am and what I make

hero.subtitle: Quiet craft, careful delivery. I shape ideas with code and writing.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I build, I keep notes on living, and I share what I learn — slowly.
about.role: Engineer / Writer / Observer of everyday life
about.p1: I'm ZK. 知墨 is my personal site for work I've made, fragments of life worth keeping, and knowledge I'm happy to share.
about.p2: I prefer whitespace and readability over noise. When I build, I aim for usefulness; when I write, I try to stay brief and clear.
about.p3: Cooking, travel, and music take up a lot of life outside the screen. They shape how I notice detail, rhythm, and taste.
about.paths_subtitle: Work, records, and knowledge are the main threads of 知墨. Start wherever you like.

works.title: My work
works.text: Projects and experiments — from web apps to small tools — as a record of making.

life.title: Life notes
life.text: Daily moments, process, and notes from the road — written so they can be read again.

share.title: Shared knowledge
share.text: Things I've learned and thought through, organized by topic for anyone to browse.

interests.label: Off the page
interests.title: Things I love
interests.subtitle: They may not sit in a project list, but they still shape how I make and notice.

items.title: Cooking
items.text: Heat, proportion, waiting — like code, the details decide the taste.

items.title: Travel
items.text: Walking, light, and the smell of a place. Travel notes will grow in Records.

items.title: Music
items.text: While working and on the road. Music sets rhythm — and sometimes the mood of a page.

about.invite: If you're also making, learning, or in between — feel free to look around.
about.invite_sub: Want to say hello? The contact page is open.
